text_block_list.text:
I see Zenno Rob Roy talking with someone in the
central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see... So, you mean to say that the spell
failed because I didn't recite the incantation
written in the grimoire correctly?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yep, exactly! And now that you know what the
problem was, it'll definitely work next time!
choice_data_list: What are you two talking about?
What are you two talking about?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um, hello.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I was just talking about magic with Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Mmhmm! I am Sweep Tosho after all, Tracen's greatest magical girl!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy is a fellow magic connoisseur. Her
knowledge almost rivals my own!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't call myself a connoisseur. I've just
picked up a lot of stuff from the books I've read.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Don't be so humble! Why, just the other day...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Under an overpass with no one in sight... Oh yes,
this is the perfect spot for some serious magic
practice.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well? Are you excited or are you excited?! This is how it feels to be a magical girl! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Before we begin, I'll teach you the four magical
elements. This is very, very important, so pay
attention!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean like fire, water, earth, and wind?
And then you add aether to make the fifth one,
unless I'm mistaken...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
A-ah... So you already know all of them?! You
really did your research!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...That's also when our spell fizzled out into
nothing, remember?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Right! It's decided, then! We're going to do some
more magic training and stage a comeback!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: What?! Right now?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Once I come up with an idea, I go all in! Plus, I
think you've got the potential!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! I'm down for any training you fancy, Rob
Roy. Let me hear it!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um... Well... I can't really come up with
anything on the spot...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Fine. In that case... You there, Trainer! Coming up
with training plans is your job, right?

...It's fallen on me to think of a plan. The first one
that springs to mind is...
choice_data_list: Deepen your knowledge with more reading.
Start off with some strength training!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I do love reading. That might be the perfect
place to start.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Then behold my most prized grimoire!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It might be a little intense for a beginner, but I'll
help you make sense of the parts you don't get. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Now, if we're going to be studying,
why don't we head over to the library?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's jump right in with the chapter on
fundamentals... Hm? What's this word again?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean this one? Hm, if I were to guess
from context...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I believe it means "to concentrate."

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right, uh-huh! I just remembered! Yep, that's
totally it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And what does this word right here mean aga—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! What I mean is, let's see if you can
figure out how to read this part yourself, Rob
Roy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, okay. Actually, I was pretty curious to see
what else was written here.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Once I start reading, I'll just keep going, so listen
carefully, okay Sweep?

The girls read for a while, deepening their
concentration and knowledge of magic.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Aren't we supposed to be doing magic training? I
don't feel like that's all that relevant...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Actually, magic is deeply tied to physical
strength.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Really?! I thought it was all about increasing
magical power!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, for example, if you cast a levitation spell on
a boulder, but it doesn't rise up...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You can lift it using your arms instead! In times
like those, you need "muscle magic"!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Can you really call that... magic?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Now, to the gym! I'll show you a great
muscle magic training regimen!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Phew. I really worked up a sweat. Do you think I'm
getting the hang of it?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You were fantastic! Not on my level yet, but
those were some good moves, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've used up our energy, it's the
perfect time to take a break and recharge with
something sweet. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that sounds wonderful. Let's head to the
cafeteria.

The girls head to the cafeteria after finishing their
"muscle magic" training.
